zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Nilsson於1611年出生在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布時，他的父親Nils Henriksson41歲，母親Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter26歲。他於大約1632年與Margeta Olofsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1695年住在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可且於1695年住在瑞典諾波頓特布。他在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可被列為bonde。他去世於1676年1月26日在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年65歲，埋葬在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nils Nilsson于1611年出生在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布时，他的父亲Nils Henriksson41岁，母亲Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter26岁。他于大约1632年与Margeta Olofsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1695年住在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可且于1695年住在瑞典諾波頓特布。他在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可被列为bonde。他去世于1676年1月26日在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年65岁，埋葬在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。

nameMeanings.name: Nilsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Per, Anders, Egil, Lennart, Sven, Birgit, Fredrik, Sten, Algot.  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Gerhard, Gotthard, Karl-Heinz.
Swedish and German: patronymic from the personal name Nils, a shortened form of Nikolaus. Compare Nilson , Neilson 3, and Nielson 2.

variants.name: Nilson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Alvar, Holger, Kristoffer, Mats, Sven.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Nilsson  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Nilsen   and of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Nielsen  , all cognates of 1. Compare   Nielson  .

nameMeanings.name: Nils
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.description: Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.
Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Nilsson was born in 1611, in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden, his father, Nils Henriksson, was 41 and his mother, Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, was 26. He married Margeta Olofsdotter about 1632, in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden in 1695 and Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden in 1695. His occupation is listed as bonde in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden. He died on 26 January 1676, in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden, at the age of 65, and was buried in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Nilsson est né en 1611, à Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suède, son père, Nils Henriksson, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margeta Olofsdotter environ 1632, à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède en 1695 et à Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Suède en 1695. Sa profession de son indiquée est bonde à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1676, à Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Nilsson 1611 in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nils Henriksson 41 und seine Mutter Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter 26. Er hat um 1632 in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden Margeta Olofsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1695 hat er in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden und 1695 in Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden gelebt. sein Beruf ist als bonde in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Januar 1676 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden und wurde in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Nilsson è nato il nel 1611 nel Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia, il suo padre, Nils Henriksson, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margeta Olofsdotter circa 1632, nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia nel 1695 e nel Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia nel 1695. La sua occupazione è indicata come bonde nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1676, nel Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nils Nilssonが1611年にスウェーデンノルボッテンブoルジェルスブインで生まれた時，父Nils Henrikssonは41歳，母Ingrid Gudbrandsdotterは26歳であった。約1632年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスでMargeta Olofsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1695年にはスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスに，1695年にはスウェーデンノルボッテンイッテルブインに住んでいた。スウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスでの職業はbondeと記録されている。彼は1676年1月26日にスウェーデンノルボッテンブoルジェルスブインで65歳で死去し，スウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Nilsson(이)가 1611년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 브o르j스빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nils Henriksson(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1632년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 Margeta Olofsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1695년도에 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서, 1695년도에 스웨덴 노르벗텐 이터빈에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 bonde이었다. 그는 1676년 1월 26일 스웨덴 노르벗텐 브o르j스빈에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Nilsson nasceu em 1611, em Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia, seu pai, Nils Henriksson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margeta Olofsdotter aproximadamente 1632, em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia em 1695 e em Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia em 1695. Sua profissão aparece como bonde em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1676, em Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Nilsson родился в 1611 г. в местности бoрджелсбин, норрботтен, Швеция, его отцу по имени Nils Henriksson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margeta Olofsdotter около 1632 г. в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция в 1695 году и в местности иттирбин, норрботтен, Швеция в 1695 году.  Он работал по профессии bonde в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция. Он умер 26 января 1676 г. в местности бoрджелсбин, норрботтен, Швеция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Nilsson nació en 1611, en Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia, su papá, Nils Henriksson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margeta Olofsdotter aproximadamente 1632, en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia en 1695 y en Ytterbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia en 1695. Su ocupación registrada era bonde en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia. Murió el 26 de enero de 1676, en Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia.
